ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction record */,
  "id1" TEXT /* Identifier for the first gene/protein in the interaction */,
  "id2" TEXT /* Identifier for the second gene/protein in the interaction */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Composite tag representing the interaction between two identifiers */,
  "tag_counts" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences for the interaction tag */,
  "selfpairs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is a self-pair */,
  "degree_percentile_1" REAL /* Degree percentile of the first identifier */,
  "degree_percentile_2" REAL /* Degree percentile of the second identifier */,
  "degree_percentile_product" REAL /* Product of the degree percentiles of both identifiers */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source from which the interaction is derived */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, regulation) */,
  "interaction_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the interaction */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Context or conditions under which the interaction occurs */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("id2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("id1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene/protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Official name of the gene/protein */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description providing additional context about the gene/protein */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* DNA or RNA sequence of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the gene */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Chromosomal location of the gene */,
  "gene_expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "gene_orthologs" TEXT /* List of orthologous genes in other species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag used for representing an interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag's meaning or purpose */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  "tag_source" TEXT /* Source of the tag (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  "tag_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction it relates to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* The name of the metric (e.g., tag_counts, degree_percentile_product) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* The value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the metric */,
  "metric_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interaction data */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed log message for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_hierarchy" TEXT /* Hierarchy of the role (e.g., admin > researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, user update) */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction this version corresponds to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the interaction record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created or modified */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the changes */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, publication) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
